name: hx-ui
description: House design system: @hx/tokens npm package + @hx shadcn composite registry. See README.md.

scripts.lint:fixtures: node packages/tokens/bin/hx-lint-tokens.mjs fixtures/radix-app/app/globals.css --src fixtures/radix-app/app && node packages/tokens/bin/hx-lint-tokens.mjs fixtures/baseui-app/app/globals.css --src fixtures/baseui-app/app
scripts.check: pnpm build:tokens && pnpm check:semver && pnpm test:lint-self && pnpm check:purity && pnpm build:registry && node scripts/copy-to-fixtures.mjs && pnpm -r --filter "./fixtures/*" build && pnpm lint:fixtures && node scripts/check-emission.mjs
